name: GOLFTEC Herndon
about: GOLFTEC Herndon is a technology-driven golf training center focused on improving player performance through data and personalized coaching. The facility uses advanced systems like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide detailed swing feedback. Lessons are structured around personalized game plans designed to address specific areas for improvement. Services include golf lessons, club fitting, and practice memberships, all conducted in an indoor setting with access to training bays equipped with launch monitors.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using OPTIMOTION technology and launch monitors
Personalized improvement plans and coaching tailored to individual goals
Club fitting services with launch monitor data for optimized equipment

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available, though many clients bring their own equipment for fittings or lessons.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are permitted in the facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The facility focuses on lessons and practice rather than full 18-hole simulator play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and welcomes young golfers with age-appropriate coaching.
